title: Mini Swords
description: A Minecraft mod that add small swords to Minecraft
body:
# What the mod Add ✨
this is a Minecraft forge mod add small sword to Minecraft it looks vanilla texture
![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c859cd6e1688734a3a48df8696528402370fcbda.png)
